{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"202603230251335B8E8C572EDF0CEA20FF"}"},"total":25},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7587459023289598744","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"挺好的，人物描写很生动"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1766595021,"group_id":"7579640309970127897","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"爱赚钱","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2Ny8nzK28OsL6zk1CgOSm2qHFnkvPqRytSeFMMqkTg9CU","gender":0,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":1,"user_avatar":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-static/3abe6a50e39b4bf1ba7c29f33074e1a8~tplv-1yzifmftcy-expand:200:0:0.png","user_id":"2733833453308820","user_name":"又逢春spring"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"2733833453308820","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7579640309970127897","book_info":{"abstract":"“林墨，你这种烂泥扶不上墙的差生，只配去电子厂打螺丝！拿着你的退学通知书，滚！”
高三誓师大会前夕，班主任李凤霞当众撕毁了林墨的试卷，将他赶出教室。
全校嘲笑，众叛亲离，林墨甚至成了三中最大的笑话。
就在他走出校门的那一刻，耳边响起一道冰冷的机械音：
【叮！检测到宿主情绪波动峰值，全能学霸系统激活！】
【开启神之视角：万物皆有逻辑，知识具象化加载中……】
从此，林墨眼中的世界变了。
晦涩难懂的数学压轴题？在他眼中分解为三个发光的破绽点！
听不懂的英语听力？自动转化为实时中文字幕！
背不下的文言文？瞬间构建全息影像记忆宫殿！
……
三个月后。
当曾经的垫底差生林墨，站在国际奥林匹克竞赛的领奖台上，手捧金牌，被清北招生办围堵时。
记者采访：“林同学，听说您曾被劝退，是什么支撑您走到今天？”
林墨看着镜头，淡淡一笑：“因为我想证明，没有教不好的学生，只有不会教的老师。”
电视前，前班主任看着这一幕，悔恨痛哭，瘫软在地。
但这只是开始。
从整顿全校风气，到带领全班“学渣”逆袭一本线；
从解决世界级数学猜想，到打破欧美科技封锁；
林墨：我不生产知识，我只是真理的搬运工。","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/bff85c24eb4f9f433bf15f2c4cfb4401","author":"苏州府的小刘莹","author_id":"","book_id":"7579640309970127897","book_name":"被退学当天，我激活全能学霸系统","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#282020","creation_status":"1","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"5232人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":262,"name":"都市脑洞","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=262&name=都市脑洞&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":1,"name":"都市","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1&name=都市&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":19,"name":"系统","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=19&name=系统&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":82,"name":"学霸","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=82&name=学霸&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":522,"name":"打脸","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=522&name=打脸&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":856,"name":"全能","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=856&name=全能&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7579644225201914393","read_count":"5232","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"626502"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"6.6","serial_count":"267","tags":"都市脑洞,都市,系统,学霸,打脸,全能","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/p2oae3a607e03246c41bf9a0bf5a2a97025~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779389493&x-signature=O0n834PR72fYze%2BiJB08sOGei2A%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"800922242917832","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"42"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"202603230251335B8E8C572EDF0CEA20FF"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读59分钟后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":2,"forwarded_count":0,"liste
